mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_snapshot) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{addressSnapshot})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_snapshot, payment_time, shipping_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_snapshot, payment_time, shipping_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_snapshot, payment_time, shipping_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, order_no, user_id, total_amount, status, address_snapshot, payment_time, shipping_time, complete_time, cancel_time, create_time, update_time FROM orders WHERE status = 0 AND create_time < #{deadline}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3)
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM orders WHERE status IN (1, 2, 3) AND create_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime}
